title: Avoiding re-render via store subscription
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Selector + shallow equal.
2. Per-field subscription.
solution:
import {useShallow} from 'zustand/react/shallow';
const {a,b} = useStore(useShallow(s => ({a: s.a, b: s.b})));
trade_offs: Optimization adds measurement and some implementation complexity; keep the simpler path unless profiler evidence shows the bottleneck.
regression_prevention: CI/RUM guardrail: profiler or EXPLAIN snapshot plus a hard budget for latency, bundle size, heap growth, or dropped frames.

title: Removing unused TypeScript types from bundle
diagnosis_steps: Bundle has runtime artifacts of types
reasoning:

2. isolatedModules=true ensures.
trade_offs: Optimization adds measurement and some implementation complexity; keep the simpler path unless profiler evidence shows the bottleneck.
regression_prevention: tsconfig isolatedModules

title: DNS prefetch and preconnect strategy
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. preconnect for known critical 3rd-party.
2. dns-prefetch lighter (just DNS).
3. crossorigin needed for CORS.
solution:
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://api.example.com" crossorigin/>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" crossorigin/>
<link rel="dns-prefetch" href="https://analytics.example.com"/>
regression_prevention: CI/RUM guardrail: profiler or EXPLAIN snapshot plus a hard budget for latency, bundle size, heap growth, or dropped frames.

title: Reducing render-blocking CSS
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. Critical CSS inlined.
2. Non-critical loaded async.
3. preload + onload.
solution:
<head>
  <style>/* critical above-fold CSS inlined */</style>
  <link rel="preload" href="/main.css" as="style" onload="this.onload=null;this.rel='stylesheet'"/>
  <noscript><link rel="stylesheet" href="/main.css"/></noscript>
</head>
regression_prevention: CI/RUM guardrail: profiler or EXPLAIN snapshot plus a hard budget for latency, bundle size, heap growth, or dropped frames.

title: Service Worker for offline + caching
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. SW cache static assets.
2. Stale-while-revalidate for dynamic.
3. Update strategy crucial.
trade_offs: Stale-while-revalidate is safe only for public idempotent GET responses; authenticated or personalized API responses should honor Cache-Control and Vary instead of being cached broadly.
regression_prevention: Add service-worker route tests for auth headers, non-GET requests, and private API paths; track cache_hit and stale_response age metrics.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Caching every /api/ response can leak user-specific data, serve stale mutations, and ignore backend Cache-Control policies.

title: Avoiding unnecessary state updates

performance_problem.symptom: setState with same value triggers render

reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. React bails out on same value (===).
2. But new object/array refs trigger.
3. Use functional setState if depending on prior.
trade_offs: Optimization adds measurement and some implementation complexity; keep the simpler path unless profiler evidence shows the bottleneck.

title: PostgreSQL TOAST configuration
anti_patterns_to_avoid: No EXTERNAL strategy for big text
reasoning:
Senior thinking:
1. TOAST automatic for large.
2. EXTERNAL strategy avoids compression for fast access.
solution: ALTER TABLE articles ALTER COLUMN body SET STORAGE EXTERNAL;

reasoning:
Senior thinking:
